parties.name: PHAN, PAMELA 1209 OAK ST SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117

calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Phan in Propria Persona.
Viet Vu (Son of Pamela) also present.

Ms. Phan stated that her husband opened the safe deposit box when she was not in Viet Nam, that she and her husband lived six months out of the year in Viet Nam and six months here, that he opened the safe deposit box with the old passport and that this is a renewed passport. Ms. Phan also stated that the reason for opening the safe deposit box is because valuables are not safe in the house in Viet Nam. Mr. Vu stated that he looked at his own passport and sees that the authorities changed the number on his renewed passport as well, that the money in the safe deposit box came from a joint bank account that is here and that it is all community property. The Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.
